exercise_library.execution: Set shoulders down and back, touch lower chest, and press with consistent bar path.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Closest free-weight press when flat bench setup is unavailable.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Primary chest strength and hypertrophy anchor for weekly progression tracking.

exercise_library.execution: Initiate with scapular depression and pull elbows to torso while keeping chest tall.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Bodyweight vertical pull alternative for similar lat stimulus.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Primary vertical pull slot to maintain full-body back volume.

exercise_library.execution: Use controlled descent to full depth while maintaining knee tracking over toes.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Lower-body quad-dominant substitute when hack squat machine is unavailable.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Primary quad slot preserving lower-body mechanical tension.

exercise_library.execution: Push hips back with slight knee bend and maintain neutral spine throughout hinge.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Direct hamstring substitute when hinge loading is constrained.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Primary posterior-chain progression slot and hamstring anchor.

exercise_library.execution: Press with forearms vertical and lower dumbbells to upper chest under control.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Primary horizontal press substitute for similar pressing demand.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Secondary press slot supporting chest weekly volume target.

exercise_library.execution: Pull elbows back and pause without extending lumbar spine.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Machine variation for stable loading and similar pull angle.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Secondary back slot used to stabilize weekly pull balance.

exercise_library.execution: Press overhead with neutral torso and avoid lumbar extension.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Pressing pattern substitute when seated overhead setup is unavailable.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Shoulder compound slot maintaining pressing variety and delt progression.

exercise_library.execution: Drive elbows down with controlled full stretch and no lower-body swing.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Closest vertical pull substitute with scalable loading.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Vertical pull anchor used for progression continuity across blocks.

exercise_library.execution: Maintain constant pec tension and avoid shoulder shrugging.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Alternative chest-focused movement if cable setup is unavailable.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Dedicated weak-area slot to keep chest emphasis during compressed schedules.

exercise_library.execution: Curl through full range with controlled eccentric and no hip lift.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Posterior-chain substitute when curl machine is unavailable.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Dedicated weak-area slot to preserve hamstring emphasis under day compression.

exercise_library.execution: Keep elbows behind the torso and supinate hard through the top of each rep.
exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Direct arm-isolation slot used to preserve biceps volume after compounds.

exercise_library.execution: Keep upper arms pinned and fully extend the elbows while separating the rope at the bottom.
exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Direct arm-isolation slot used to preserve triceps volume after compounds.

exercise_library.execution: Raise through the scapular plane with minimal torso sway and steady cable tension.
exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Direct delt-isolation slot to preserve shoulder volume without excess systemic fatigue.

exercise_library.execution: Curl through full range with hips pinned and controlled eccentric tempo.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Posterior-chain substitute when curl machine is unavailable.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Hamstring isolation slot that preserves knee-flexion work alongside hinge loading.

exercise_library.execution: Brace chest against pad, pull elbows back, and pause briefly in peak contraction.

valid_substitutions.rationale: Closest chest-supported row pattern when dedicated machine is unavailable.

exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Back-volume slot used to preserve supported rowing without extra low-back fatigue.

exercise_library.execution: Take a stable stance, descend under control, and drive through the front leg.
exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Single-leg lower-body slot that preserves quad/glute stimulus when machine options are limited.

exercise_library.execution: Move through a full stretch and peak contraction without bouncing.
exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Direct calf slot used to keep lower-leg hypertrophy work in the weekly plan.

exercise_library.execution: Crunch down through the trunk while keeping hips stable and abs shortened hard at the bottom.
exercise_library.slot_usage_rationale: Direct trunk-flexion slot to preserve core work without adding much systemic fatigue.

program_intent.phase_goal: Accumulate high-quality hypertrophy volume across all major muscle groups over a 10-week full-body mesocycle.
program_intent.progression_philosophy: Double progression with top-of-range rep attainment before load increases, then staged intensity exposure.
program_intent.fatigue_management: Use weekly RIR caps, schedule a mid-cycle deload, and reduce low-priority accessory volume first under recovery stress.
non_negotiables: Preserve primary compound lifts across all frequency adaptations.
Retain chest and hamstring weak-point slots each week.
flexible_elements: Accessory/isolation slot count under temporary constraints.
Accessory rotation between weeks when days are limited.
Set count reductions for non-priority slots during high fatigue.
preserve_when_frequency_reduced: At least one chest and one hamstring weak-point exposure each adapted week.
At least one quad, hinge, horizontal press, and vertical/horizontal pull pattern weekly.
Progression continuity on bench, hack squat, and Romanian deadlift.

frequency_adaptation_rules.reintegration_policy: When temporary constraints end, resume next authored week in sequence while preserving updated progression state for all carried lifts.
